ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Pettition For Allowance Of Compensation And Expenses Of Co-Trustee Jacqueline B. Norman
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip Keith (Counsel for the Estate of Verdell Price); Lloyd Crenna (Counsel for the Objectors); Paul Melbostad (Counsel for Acting Trustee Wiley Price); David Nemer (Counsel for Jacqueline Norman).

Counsel presented oral argument with respect to the fee request by Ms. Norman as ex-Trustee and the related claim by Norman Mechanical, including whether each claim was time-barred, subject to res judicata, laches and the want of a verified objection by the objectors. The issue as to what extent, if any, Mr. Crenna's attorney fees should be paid by the Trust was also addressed and argued. After hearing argument, the Court requested that Mr. Crenna file a verification for his clients' objection on or before October 31, 2006 and will take these matters under submission once the Verification has been filed.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722 ; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Paul Melbostad appearing for and with Acting Trustee Wiley Price. Lloyd Crenna appearing for objecting beneficiaries. David Nemer appearing for and with Jacqueline Norman. Philip Keith appearing for the Estate of Verdell Price. Disputes are not settled. Issue on reimbursement to Verdell addressed. The same issue was argued in the trial. The $10,500.00 will be reimbursed from the trust but not charged against Verdell's share to Verdell's estate. Mr. Crenna has no objection to $6,000.00 trustee's fee. Court is approving trustee's fees as requested. Court is approving trustee's 2nd amended account and report. It is appropriate for the trust to pay Ronnie Jones. No surcharge against Ms. Noramn. Mr. Melbostad will prepare an order.
On Ms. Norman's petition, she wants to reply to the objections. Matter is continued to 10/30. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
